reference: I haven't run for a long time, and the past week I started running again. However, as I keep running, my heart starts to thump faster and faster, and then it starts to feel like it is going to explode. I have no choice but to stop running and wait for it to stop every time. I remember before when I ran in seventh and eighth grades, my heart didn't feel like it was going to explode; it felt different. Also, sometimes when I am running, my stomach feels like it is burning. I just finished running today, and I feel really, really light-headed. Is this normal? Is this the result of not running for a long time, or do I have heart problems or asthma? I do not have asthma... I think I am getting it though.
